result.stdout:
Description:
  CopilotPrReviewer - AI-powered PR code reviewer for Azure DevOps

Usage:
  Cuteribs.CopilotPrReviewer <--pr-url> [options]

Arguments:
  <--pr-url>  The URL of the pull request to review

Options:
  --pat <pat>                          Azure DevOps personal access token
  --auth-type <auth-type>              Authentication type: 'pat', 'oauth' (default: auto-detect)
  --model <model>                      AI model to use for review
  --timeout <timeout>                  Timeout for the review process (in seconds, default: 300)
  --github-token <github-token>        GitHub token for Copilot authentication
  --guidelines-path <guidelines-path>  Path to external guidelines folder
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>        Maximum parallel batch reviews
  --no-comments                        Skip posting comments to PR
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
  --version                            Show version information

commands.payload:
Description:
  CopilotPrReviewer - AI-powered PR code reviewer for Azure DevOps

Usage:
  Cuteribs.CopilotPrReviewer <--pr-url> [options]

Arguments:
  <--pr-url>  The URL of the pull request to review

Options:
  --pat <pat>                          Azure DevOps personal access token
  --auth-type <auth-type>              Authentication type: 'pat', 'oauth' (default: auto-detect)
  --model <model>                      AI model to use for review
  --timeout <timeout>                  Timeout for the review process (in seconds, default: 300)
  --github-token <github-token>        GitHub token for Copilot authentication
  --guidelines-path <guidelines-path>  Path to external guidelines folder
  --max-parallel <max-parallel>        Maximum parallel batch reviews
  --no-comments                        Skip posting comments to PR
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
  --version                            Show version information
